title: Block Wand
description: Retextures and renames the Debug Stick to Block Wand. 2 textures available.
body:
**A small tweak for those who'd like to add some magic to their debug stick!**

## There are 2 Versions!
- Regular Stick with an Ender Pearl at the end
- Netherite Stick with an Eye of Ender at the end

## Feedback
As with all my other stuff, feel free to give me feedback on my [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/u9SRbexPwk).
